name: z-image-turbo
notes_low: Focused Z-Image Turbo pack with Qwen 3 4B FP8 text encoder and BF16 diffusion. Set NVFP4_SUPPORTED=true to swap diffusion to official z_image_turbo_nvfp4.
notes_high: Focused Z-Image Turbo pack with BF16 Qwen 3 4B text encoder, BF16 diffusion, and VAE.
description: Z-Image Turbo fast distilled text-to-image workflow and model stack.
